item_titles: Video generation startup PixVerse raises $439M, valuation soars past $2B
PixVerse's $2B valuation shows investors still believe AI video generation has room for another winner
产业与全球资本共同加注，爱诗科技完成29.8亿元C轮融资
clusters.summary: AI视频生成公司PixVerse在C轮融资中筹集4.39亿美元，估值突破20亿美元；爱诗科技也完成了29.8亿元C轮融资。
clusters.title: AI视频生成初创公司PixVerse与爱诗科技获巨额融资

item_titles: PolyInterview: An LLM-based Platform for Immersive Mock Interview Practice with Comprehensive Multimodal Assessment

clusters.title: 求职者利用AI作弊面试及相关模拟面试工具

item_titles: Nadella calls out AI labs like OpenAI and Anthropic for banning distillation while training on everyone else's data
Satya Nadella has issued a shocking warning to companies using AI
The real AI race may no longer be at the frontier
clusters.summary: 微软CEO萨提亚·纳德拉警告企业不要使用专有模型，并批评OpenAI和Anthropic等实验室在禁止蒸馏的同时却使用公共数据训练。
clusters.title: 微软CEO纳德拉警告AI行业的封闭模型与数据使用双重标准

item_titles: Deepmind CEO Hassabis says "nobody in the world knows what happens next" so "cautious optimism" means building guardrails now
What Anthropic’s latest AI discovery does—and doesn’t—show

clusters.title: DeepMind CEO哈萨比斯呼吁建立AI监管标准
